binding: Scenario B (count-based n_eff), HoI-ratified 13 Jul 2026. ANCHORS are the canonical 2007 Royal Canadian Mint proof set (fixture PCS-CA-2026-0007), the v01→v02 evidence ladder — Silver when custody is thin, Gold once provenance is supplied — reproduced to the digit at the coins scaleFactor (10). They prove the deterministic engine on a known coin. The scorer's ability to FLAG a fake is proven category-independently by the §12 golden (fake Daytona → Flagged); the coins-specific negative is a field_golden obligation. FIELD_GOLDEN are real coins run end-to-end through coins.v1.json → enrich → score, each with an expert-assigned tier and a named ground-truth source (must include a known-fake); a category is only honestly 'calibrated' once its field_golden set validates.
